items.target: sanitizedFixtureClient hard-wired in service.New bypassing any provider selection
items.verification: grep for sanitizedFixtureClient as the only provider path in service.New returns no matches; provider selection is injected

items.target: fixture-only client being the sole runtime provider (no live path exists)
items.verification: A --live flag or config gate activates live provider; go test ./... with no live env vars still passes fixture-only

items.target: credential layer that reports env/token status but has no native Keychain resolution
items.verification: auth status reports keychain as a token source when keychain-stored token is present; go test ./... passes without keychain dependency

items.target: fixture-only sync producing fixture-shaped records (ISSUE-42, WIKI-HOME) as the only sync path
items.verification: sync --live produces real issue/wiki records from GitCode API; sync without --live still uses fixtures

items.target: create-issue --live returning 'fixture client is read-only' error
items.verification: create-issue --live with valid token creates issue on remote; no 'fixture client is read-only' error path remains for live writes

items.target: stale_index false positive: indexed_at set to zero time and content hash mismatch after fresh sync/index
items.verification: sync_status reports zero stale_index entries after fresh sync/index

items.target: search_sources returning cache_empty after successful sync/index
items.verification: search_sources returns non-empty results after sync/index; no cache_empty error path on populated cache

items.target: MCP kind enum containing source/task/page/decision/handoff instead of issue/wiki
items.verification: MCP tool schemas show issue and wiki in kind enum; legacy enums removed or deprecated

items.target: CLI subcommand --help paths returning invalid-query diagnostics
items.verification: All subcommand --help paths return valid help text and exit 0

items.target: Silently opening old cache databases without schema version check or migration diagnostic
items.verification: Opening old cache reports schema mismatch with actionable message; migrate-cache upgrades compatible schemas

items.target: Runtime audit reporting only config and credential status without repo/cache/index/MCP readiness detail
items.verification: doctor reports all readiness dimensions: version, config, cache, repo, token, live provider, auth probe, sync, index, MCP transport

items.target: MCP read tools only validated against fixture data, no live-cache parity test
items.verification: MCP parity validation passes against live-synced cache; all read tools return correct results

items.target: Documentation that does not describe live sync setup, provider selection, credential flow, or sanitization rules
items.verification: docs/live-readiness.md, updated architecture.md, cache-and-sync-model.md, and public-safety rules exist and are accurate
